title: Simple cleanser routine (AM/PM)
lead: Fast morning & gentle evening sequence to keep your barrier happy.
steps: AM: Rinse → Cleanser (30–60s) → Toner Mist → Serum → Cream → SPF.
PM: If you wore SPF/makeup — double cleanse.
checklist:
AM: Cleanser → Toner → Serum → Cream → SPF
PM: (Double) Cleanser → Toner → Serum → Cream

title: Face mask: 2× per week
lead: Use after cleansing for 10–15 min. Rinse, then toner → serum → cream.
steps: Apply on dry skin for 10–15 min.
Rinse lukewarm, then Toner → Serum → Cream.
Sensitive? Start with 1×/week and spot-test first.
checklist: Cleanse → Mask 10–15 min → Rinse → Toner → Serum → Cream

title: Almonds: how to store fresh
lead: Keep oils from going rancid: airtight, cool, and away from light.
steps: Move almonds to airtight glass jars and label the date.
Store in a cool, dark cupboard for short term (up to 1–2 months).
For longer freshness: fridge up to 6 months or freezer up to 12 months.
Avoid heat, sunlight, and moisture; keep lids tightly closed.
checklist: Jar (airtight) → Label date → Cool/dark → For long term: fridge/freezer

title: Multipurpose spray — quick clean routine
lead: Daily wipe-downs for kitchens and bathrooms without harsh chemicals.
steps: Spray from 15–20 cm onto the surface.
Wait 30–60 s to let the formula work.
Wipe with a clean cloth; for stubborn spots repeat once.
Do not use on unsealed wood or natural stone without spot test.
checklist: Spray 15–20 cm → Wait 30–60 s → Wipe clean → Repeat for spots

title: Natural sponge/loofah — care & hygiene
lead: Keep it fresh and longer-lasting with quick rinses and drying.
steps: Rinse thoroughly after use to remove residue.
Squeeze out excess water; hang to air-dry completely.
Weekly: soak 5–10 min in warm water with a bit of vinegar, then rinse.
Replace every 4–6 weeks or sooner if it smells or breaks apart.
checklist: Rinse → Squeeze → Air-dry → Weekly vinegar soak → Replace 4–6 wks
